title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 632.445 - No liability for petitioners
text:
632.445.  No liability for petitioners. — No person making or filing an application alleging that a person should be involuntarily detained, certified or committed, treated or evaluated pursuant to this chapter shall be rendered civilly or criminally liable if the application was made and filed in good faith.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724) 
Alcohol and drug abuse detention, no liability for petitioners, 631.175
